task:
In Google Chrome, load file:///home/user/Documents/survey_form.html (a local customer survey form) and submit it with these exact values:
- Name: `Alice Johnson`
- Email: `alice@example.com`
- Rating: `5 - Excellent`
- Feedback: `Great service and fast delivery`

After submission, the form must be replaced by a confirmation showing `Thank you for your feedback!` plus the submitted name `Alice Johnson` and feedback text. In a second tab, load https://example.com. Both tabs must remain open.

verification.description: Tab with local survey_form.html is open
Confirmation message 'Thank you' is displayed after form submission
Submitted name 'Alice Johnson' appears in confirmation
Submitted feedback text appears in confirmation
